description: A formal 18th-century portrait of Abraham Newland, depicted as a distinguished older gentleman with white powdered hair, wearing a dark coat and waistcoat with a white cravat. He stands with one hand in his pocket and the other resting near papers and an inkwell on a table. A dark red curtain forms the background, with a glimpse of architecture and sky at the left. The style is characteristic of George Romney's refined English portrait painting. No biblical or religious content is present.
